general_rule: For any positive integer n, n! > 2^n
Quicksort has O(n log n) average time complexity and is faster than insertion sort
The sum of interior angles of a polygon with n sides is (n-2) * 180 degrees
Adding more workers to a project reduces the completion time proportionally
edge_case: the project has a single indivisible task

general_rule: A hash table provides O(1) average lookup time
edge_case: all keys hash to the same bucket
